overall.description: A third-person perspective clip from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character descending an outdoor staircase at night, walking through a landscaped bamboo garden, and entering a neon-lit bar with vibrant pink lighting. The scene features futuristic urban architecture with glass walls, illuminated vegetation, and the bustling atmosphere of Night City.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor staircase with glass railings overlooking neon city street

agents.ego_description: the player character descends an outdoor staircase with glass railings, overlooking the neon-lit city street below

entered.detail: mature tree with dramatic uplighting positioned beside the staircase
transparent glass panels with metal frames lining the stairwell
view of the neon-lit city street visible through the glass walls below
distant illuminated signage and building lights from the cityscape

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at the top of an outdoor staircase at night, with a large illuminated tree on the right and glass railings revealing a neon cityscape below. The camera descends steadily, maintaining view of the urban lights in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower staircase approaching street level with neon storefronts visible

events.description: reaches the bottom of the staircase and transitions to the ground level walkway

agents.ego_description: continuing down the stairs toward street level, approaching a landscaped area with pink neon lights visible through the glass

entered.detail: hexagonal illuminated planter with bamboo plants at the bottom of the stairs
building facade with bright pink neon lighting visible across the street

segments.scene_description: The descent continues to the lower level of the stairwell, where the large tree exits view and a bamboo garden area becomes visible at the bottom. Pink neon lights from across the street become more prominent as the camera approaches ground level.

scene_state.functional_zone: landscaped interior walkway with illuminated bamboo planters and glass walls

agents.ego_description: walking through a serene bamboo garden area with illuminated planters and twisted tree trunks, with the neon city visible through glass walls

entered.detail: tall bamboo stalks in illuminated hexagonal planters lining the walkway
sculptural tree trunks with green uplighting creating dramatic shadows
floor-to-ceiling glass panels separating the walkway from the city street

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a tranquil landscaped walkway featuring bamboo plants in glowing planters and artistically lit tree trunks. Glass walls on the right reveal the neon city street outside, creating a contrast between the natural interior and urban exterior.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit bar interior with pink illuminated counter and digital signage

events.description: enters the building from the garden walkway into a vibrant bar area with pink neon lighting
moves past other patrons and approaches the illuminated bar counter

agents.ego_description: the player character enters the neon-lit bar, walking past other patrons toward the pink illuminated counter

notable_agents.action: patrons walking through the bar area, some heading toward the counter
figures standing near the bar stools, engaging with the space

entered.detail: automatic glass doors marking the transition from garden to interior
long bar counter with bright pink neon underlighting and traditional paper lanterns
modern bar stools with glowing bases arranged along the counter
large screen displaying cityscape imagery above the bar area

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a vibrant bar interior dominated by a pink neon-lit counter. The space is populated with several NPCs walking and gathering near the bar. A large digital billboard displays city imagery above, while the reflective floor mirrors the colorful lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: bar interior transitioning to covered outdoor seating with umbrellas

events.description: moves from the indoor bar area to the covered outdoor seating section with umbrellas

agents.ego_description: moving through the bar toward the outdoor seating area, observing the city street through the glass walls

notable_agents.action: character in distinctive clothing walking ahead through the seating area

entered.detail: large patio umbrellas shading outdoor tables and chairs with glowing accents

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through the bar into a covered outdoor seating area with large umbrellas and glowing furniture. The pink bar counter recedes into the background as the camera approaches the glass walls overlooking the city street, where vehicles continue to pass by in the neon-lit night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a high outdoor vantage point down into a neon-drenched urban lounge. It begins at the top of a staircase at night, descending steadily past an illuminated tree and glass railings that overlook a glowing cityscape. As the camera reaches ground level, the urban vista shifts into a tranquil landscaped walkway where bamboo plants in glowing planters create a natural buffer against the vibrant pink neon lights of the street. The scene then transitions seamlessly into a bustling bar interior dominated by a pink-lit counter and digital billboards, with the reflective floor mirroring the colorful atmosphere. Finally, the camera moves through the crowd and into a covered outdoor seating area, passing under large umbrellas toward glass walls that reveal the constant flow of vehicles in the neon-lit night.
